- Expose connectWs(), isWsReady() in public API

produces invalid zodiac sign index and signEnd=390, breaking the applying-aspect
range check at the Pisces/Aries boundary (false VoC positive -> -5.0 penalty).

Hot-path: gate PlanetaryInfluences init (7 writes), per-aspect CollectionsMarshal
mutations (~24/call), name lookups (~24/call), and Mercury/VoC influence writes
behind computeInterpretation flag. Eliminates ~5.3M dict ops per 220K-candle
backtest on the EsotericFeatureProvider hot path.

Planet names: replace PlanetNames.GetValueOrDefault FrozenDictionary hash probes
with flat PlanetNamesByIdFast[planetId] array (O(1) indexing) for cold-path
usages (interpretation, debug logging).

fix: improve SLM entity resolution, name search, and output formatting (#1350)

The admin chat / SLM was effectively useless for natural language queries:
- 'show customer X' failed because 'customer' didn't match slug 'customers'
- Name-based lookups were impossible — only numeric IDs accepted
- Record output was just ToString() with no field data

Changes:
- Add fuzzy entity resolution (singular/plural, prefix, contains matching)
  in both AdminToolCatalogue (Intelligence) and QueryTools (AI)
- Add 'show-entity' intent + handler that loads by ID or searches by name
- Add SearchByName AI tool for the Copilot/IChatClient path
- Extract search text from natural language queries (everything after
  the entity name becomes a 'query' parameter)
- Format record output with actual field values instead of ToString()
- Improve help text to document new capabilities

Fixes #1338

commit.message:
docs(*): add bootstrap step to `copilot-instructions.md` (#517)

The Copilot instructions did not tell agents to bootstrap the workspace
before running validation or making package changes. In a fresh clone,
that leads to avoidable failures and wasted setup time.

- **Summary**
- Add explicit bootstrap guidance to `.github/copilot-instructions.md`.
- Place it directly before the existing test/build/lint workflow so the
install requirement is seen before any validation commands.

- **Changes**
  - Introduce a new `Bootstrapping` section in the Copilot instructions.
- Require `npm install` from the repo root before tests, builds, lint,
or implementation work.
- Clarify that work should not start until install completes
successfully because workspace dependencies are shared across the
monorepo.

- **Resulting guidance**
  ```md
  ## Bootstrapping

- In a fresh clone, run `npm install` from the repo root before
attempting tests, builds, lint, or package changes.
- Do not start validation or implementation work until the install has
completed successfully, because the workspace dependencies are required
across the monorepo.
  ```

fix(web): R4 deep audit — circuit memory leaks on InstrumentePage/FeatureImportancePage, wire CTS to TopologiePage grain calls

InstrumentePage: Dispose now releases _assetsByCategory, _allAssets, _categories,
_rules, _activePortfolio, _discoveryResult — previously only set _disposed flag
while all data stayed pinned to circuit memory after navigation.

FeatureImportancePage: Added IDisposable to release _result (70+ feature entries)
on navigation. Previously had no disposal at all.

TopologiePage: Wired _cts.Token into Task.WhenAll via WaitAsync so DisposeAsync
actually cancels in-flight Orleans grain RPCs instead of waiting for completion
on a dead component.

Switch to Flex Consumption plan with blob-based deployment

Following the official MS quickstart template for Flex Consumption
with managed identities:
- Flex Consumption plan (FC1) uses blob container for deployment
  instead of Azure Files — no file share or shared key access needed
- Storage account: allowSharedKeyAccess=false (policy-compliant)
- User-assigned managed identity with Blob Data Owner/Contributor,
  Queue Data Contributor, Table Data Contributor roles
- functionAppConfig with blobContainer deployment storage
- App settings use AzureWebJobsStorage__accountName/credential/clientId
- No WEBSITE_CONTENTAZUREFILECONNECTIONSTRING needed

commit.message:
feat(script): add raw format and large-file warnings before upload

harvester-vm.sh now runs three checks before handing off to Terraform:

1. Raw format — detected via qemu-img info (authoritative) falling back
   to file extension (.raw, .img). Warns that raw images transfer every
   allocated block and shows the qemu-img convert command to qcow2.

   a per-file outbase path in the suggested convert commands instead of
   the generic 'image.qcow2' placeholder.

3. Large file (> 2 GiB) — warns that upload will take several minutes
   and recommends qcow2 conversion if the format is not already qcow2.

commit.message:
Integrate DWPose whole-body pose conditioning into full pipeline

- Shard creation: include pose.npy as required (missing = skip record)
- Data loader: load pose.npy (133,3) float16 → float32, stack in collate_fn
- Model: pose_proj MLP (3→768→768), pose_joint_embed (133 learned),
  null_pose parameter, confidence masking, CFG dropout via cfg_drop_pose
- Training: 7-category CFG dropout (40% all, 25% text-only, 10% uncond,
  5% DINO-CLS-only, 5% DINO-patches-only, 10% drop-pose, 5% pose-only)
- Config: num_pose_joints=133, pose_confidence_threshold=0.05,
  p_drop_pose=0.10, p_pose_only=0.05
- Sampling: pose_kpts threaded through EulerSampler and ImageGenerator
- Visual debug: load and pass pose from validation samples

commit.message:
fix(engine): R3 deep audit — clamp ML WinProbability [0,1], cap WS reconnect recovery cycles, NaN-guard ensemble disagreement

1. EnsemblePredictionService: Clamp WinProbability to [0,1] at source for
   FastTree, LightGBM, LogisticRegression. ML.NET gradient-boosted models
   can output uncalibrated scores, producing ModelConfidence > 1.0 and
   distorting dynamic weights / agreement scores.

2. CapitalComWebSocketService: Add MAX_RECOVERY_CYCLES (5) with escalating
   delay (2/4/8/16/32 min). Previously, after 5 retries failed, recovery
   looped infinitely at fixed 2-min intervals. Reset cycle counter on
   successful connection.

3. EnsemblePredictionService: Add NaN/Infinity guards to
   CalculateUncertaintyWeightedPrediction and CalculateEnsembleDisagreement.
   Unlike AggregateVotes, these public methods consumed WinProbability raw,
   allowing NaN to propagate through .Average() and variance computation.
